memo: The packet describes AI-Researcher, an agentic research pipeline with three implemented evaluation mechanisms. (1) A convergent idea-selection evaluation scores five divergently generated directions against Scientific Novelty, Technical Soundness, and Transformative Potential; its output gates which single concept receives comprehensive development (R08-E01). (2) A prototype feasibility evaluation runs implementations on minimal data (1-2 epochs or small subsets) to establish baseline feasibility; successful implementations incorporating review feedback advance to full-scale experiments, while persistently unsuccessful ones are classified "unfeasible" after multiple refinement attempts, and an Advisor Agent evaluates results and recommends supplementary investigations (R08-E02, R08-E03, R08-E08). This is a genuine gate plus a feedback loop into later investigation. (3) A paper-review evaluation compares generated papers against expert conference reviewer decisions, with reported 65.62%-90.62% correct identification of the superior paper over 32 paper pairs, using debiasing via order swapping and a panel of multiple GPT, Claude, and Gemini models at temperature 1 (R08-E04, R08-E07). The benchmark distinguishes Level-1 tasks (explicit instructions from the target paper) from Level-2 tasks that omit them (R08-E05). Key architectural risks: the system runs without a dedicated external memory manager, relying on the LLM native context window (R08-E06), which bounds long-horizon state retention across the cyclical implement-review-refine process; the novelty criterion in convergent evaluation is stated as an assessed criterion but the packet does not describe any literature or prior-art retrieval step backing it; and the review agent's alignment metric is itself LLM-produced, with no independent human or external replication reported in these excerpts. The packet contains no evidence of physical/wet-lab execution, of a human approving or rejecting each direction inside the operational pipeline, of confidence calibration, or of external reproduction; those probes are answered null rather than false, per the packet's instruction that absence from excerpts is not evidence of absence.

diagnostics.statement: The convergent evaluation gates development on a Scientific Novelty criterion, but the packet describes no prior-art or literature-retrieval mechanism that grounds the novelty judgment in existing work.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: These undergo rigorous convergent evaluation against criteria including Scientific Novelty, Technical Soundness, and Transformative Potential.

diagnostics.consequence: A direction may be selected for comprehensive development while duplicating published work, since novelty is assessed by model judgment alone with no described external check.

diagnostics.statement: The implementation operates without a dedicated external memory management system, relying on the LLM native context window as the primary information repository.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Our present AI-Researcher implementation operates without a dedicated external memory management system, instead relying primarily on the LLM’s native context window as its primary information repository.

diagnostics.consequence: Across the cyclical refinement process, prior failed attempts and review feedback can fall out of context, so refinement decisions and the "unfeasible" classification may be made on incomplete history.

diagnostics.statement: The prototype feasibility check both diagnoses baseline feasibility on minimal data and acts as the gate that terminates work via "unfeasible" classification, using a very small evidence base (typically 1-2 epochs or small dataset subsets).

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The Code Agent begins by developing prototype implementations that undergo initial testing on minimal data (typically 1-2 epochs or small dataset subsets) to establish baseline feasibility.

successful implementations that incorporate review feedback advance to full-scale experiments, while persistently unsuccessful implementations receive "unfeasible" classification after multiple refinement attempts

diagnostics.consequence: Methods that need longer training to show signal may be discarded as unfeasible on the basis of a low-power diagnostic signal.

diagnostics.statement: The reported alignment of the review system with expert conference reviewers is a single-source, in-house result over 32 paper pairs, with no independent or external verification reported in the packet.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: the system demonstrates strong decision alignment with expert conference reviewers, correctly identifying the superior paper in 65.62% to 90.62% of cases, with five of six evaluators exceeding 81% accuracy across the 32 paper pairs

diagnostics.consequence: The credibility of the automated reviewer, which supplies feedback used downstream, rests on an unreplicated small-sample self-report.

diagnostics.statement: Debiasing is limited to order swapping and multi-model panels; the packet reports no analysis of residual evaluator error such as shared bias across models or confidence calibration, and the accuracy spread across evaluators is wide (65.62% to 90.62%).

exact_quotes.exact_quote: we incorporate two critical debiasing mechanisms: (1) randomly swapping the presentation order of papers to eliminate position bias, and (2) conducting multiple independent evaluations using diverse state-of-the-art LLMs
correctly identifying the superior paper in 65.62% to 90.62% of cases

diagnostics.consequence: It is unclear how panel disagreement is aggregated into a decision, so an evaluator near chance-plus may carry equal weight with a strong one.

diagnostics.statement: The packet does not identify any human approval or escalation point inside the operational pipeline; the Advisor Agent, an automated component, is the described source of analytical support and recommended supplementary investigations.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: Throughout this cyclical process, the Advisor Agent provides analytical support by evaluating results and recommending supplementary investigations.

diagnostics.consequence: Termination and advancement decisions appear fully automated, leaving no described escalation path when the automated evaluators disagree or err.

diagnostics.statement: The boundary of what the system executes is only partially specified: computational execution on data is described, but the packet gives no statement about any non-computational experimental modality.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: initial testing on minimal data (typically 1-2 epochs or small dataset subsets)
Level-2 tasks deliberately omit these instructions, challenging agents to independently formulate novel research directions using only the provided references and datasets.

diagnostics.consequence: Readers may over- or under-read the system's operational scope when comparing it to other autonomous research claims.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: These undergo rigorous convergent evaluation against criteria including Scientific Novelty, Technical Soundness, and Transformative Potential.

success_check.observable: Each of the five divergent directions carries a retrieval-backed prior-art record (retrieved citations plus overlap adjudication) attached to its Scientific Novelty score before the convergent selection is made.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: 100% of directions entering convergent evaluation have a non-empty prior-art record; selected direction shows no adjudicated duplicate.
success_check.evidence_needed: Pipeline logs of retrieval queries and returned references, with the novelty score linked to the retrieved set for each direction.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: prototype implementations that undergo initial testing on minimal data (typically 1-2 epochs or small dataset subsets) to establish baseline feasibility
persistently unsuccessful implementations receive "unfeasible" classification after multiple refinement attempts
operates without a dedicated external memory management system, instead relying primarily on the LLM’s native context window

success_check.observable: The minimal-data run is recorded as a diagnostic signal only, and the "unfeasible" terminal classification is issued by a separate step that reads a persisted record of all refinement attempts rather than the current context window.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: 0 terminations issued solely from a 1-2 epoch minimal-data run; 100% of terminations cite a persisted multi-attempt record.
success_check.evidence_needed: Per-task decision logs distinguishing diagnostic outcomes from gate outcomes, plus the persisted attempt history referenced at termination.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: creating a comprehensive panel-like review process that effectively mitigates individual model biases and enhances evaluation reliability
with five of six evaluators exceeding 81% accuracy across the 32 paper pairs

success_check.observable: Per-evaluator accuracy, pairwise inter-evaluator agreement, order-swap flip rate, and the stated panel aggregation rule are reported.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Order-swap flip rate below 10% and a documented aggregation rule; any evaluator below 70% accuracy is excluded or down-weighted.
success_check.evidence_needed: The full 32-pair per-evaluator decision matrix under both presentation orders.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: the system demonstrates strong decision alignment with expert conference reviewers, correctly identifying the superior paper in 65.62% to 90.62% of cases

success_check.observable: Alignment accuracy re-measured on a held-out paper-pair set whose expert labels are supplied by a party not involved in building the system.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Held-out accuracy within 10 percentage points of the reported in-house range on at least 32 new pairs.
success_check.evidence_needed: Independently sourced pair set with expert decision labels and the system's raw outputs on it.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: the Advisor Agent provides analytical support by evaluating results and recommending supplementary investigations
The most promising concept receives comprehensive development, resulting in a proposal that charts new scientific territory with clear implementation pathways.

success_check.observable: A named human reviewer sign-off is recorded before a selected direction proceeds to comprehensive development and before an "unfeasible" termination becomes final.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: 100% of direction selections and terminations carry a timestamped human decision record, or an explicit documented waiver.
success_check.evidence_needed: Approval log entries linked to each pipeline run.

exact_quotes.exact_quote: The Code Agent begins by developing prototype implementations that undergo initial testing on minimal data
Level-1 tasks provide explicit research instructions directly extracted from paper y, testing agents’ ability to execute given ideas

success_check.observable: An explicit scope statement enumerating which experiment modalities the system executes and which it does not, tied to the Level-1/Level-2 task definitions.
success_check.comparator_or_threshold: Scope statement present and covering every experiment type referenced in the results section, with no unlabeled modality.
success_check.evidence_needed: A system-scope section in the source document listing supported and unsupported execution modalities.
